author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Implementation complete across 4 logical commits on feat/361-issue-scheduling-fields: (1) data model + DB schema v16->v17 migration; (2) SharedWriter create_issue/update_issue threading + FieldUpdate<T> enum; (3) CLI flags on Create/Quick/Update + dispatch + commands/create.rs, update.rs, show.rs, next.rs; (4) 24 new behavioural tests covering AC-1, AC-7, AC-8, AC-9, AC-11, AC-16, AC-20 + REQ-11 and the show/parse/serde roundtrips. Full suite 4715 pass, 0 fail. Fmt + clippy -D warnings clean. Ready for push + PR.
